title: cyclosorus peekelii
intro: Cyclosorus peekelii, also known as the Peekel's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyclosorus peekelii include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its role in promoting wound healing and reducing oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyclosorus peekelii can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its therapeutic benefits.
